title: Aalto Foodsharing launches
description: Aalto Foodsharing officially starts, beginning regular food pickups in collaboration with local partners including K-Market and BakedByEli.

title: Cargo bike acquired
description: A cargo bike joins the operation, enabling larger food pickups and becoming a centrepiece at public events.

title: Aalto Restaurant Committee presentation
description: Team members present Foodsharing to the Aalto Restaurant Committee, sparking interest from Sodexo and other campus food service providers.

title: Oulu Food Waste Festival
description: Three members represent A!FS at the Oulu Food Waste Festival organised by Dodo, gaining visibility among the Finnish foodsharing community and connecting with national actors.

title: SAB Bazaar pop-up stand
description: A!FS runs a pop-up stand at the SAB Bazaar, making smoothies with the cargo bike and reaching students who had not heard of Foodsharing before.

title: Transition Town Network Finland
description: Ronja presents our volunteer coordination model via Karrot as a best-practice example at the national Transition Town Network gathering.

title: Food Conservation Workshop Series
description: A series of hands-on workshops covers pickling, lacto-fermentation, fruit leather, and bread pasta — connecting new people with food sustainability practices every Saturday.

title: Food System Talk with Joel Tefke
description: A public talk on circular food systems draws 50 registrations and around 30 attendees — the first larger public event organised by A!FS.

title: Orientation Week outreach
description: A!FS runs stands at Ota-Orienteering (two days) and Aalto Fest, reaching new students with flyers, patches, and the cargo bike.

title: Tipping Point sustainability conference
description: A!FS is represented at a critical sustainability round table in Helsinki, gaining further visibility in the city's sustainability network.

title: Community celebration & ID launch
description: A Christmas cookout at the Design Factory brings partners and members together. Foodsharer IDs are distributed for the first time.

title: Dodo Urban Dinners
description: A!FS supplies dumpster-dived food for Dodo's Urban Dinner events. Around 15 attendees at one dinner express interest in food saving — seeding a potential Helsinki Hub.

title: Foodsharing Kick-Off event
description: A public kick-off at the Design Factory recruits new foodvisionaries using a Cluedo-style game to explain roles and operations.

title: Dumpster diving intro for Extinction Rebellion
description: A!FS hosts a dumpster diving introduction for 10 members of Extinction Rebellion, broadening the movement's reach into climate activism networks.

title: World Overshoot Day action — 376K reach
description: A joint action with Elokapina and Onni Tonkija at Helsinki railway station goes viral: 376K views (6% of Finland's population), 13.5K likes, 340 new followers, and 16 people indicate interest in joining the organising team.

title: Foodsharing Helsinki takes shape
description: A new community fridge opens in collaboration with Dodo. Partners in Pasila are contacted, and an open strategy meetup is planned to integrate Foodsharing Helsinki and Aalto Foodsharing into a city-wide network.
